message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains information about a financial investment (like FD, PPF, Mutual Fund, Stocks, Bonds, etc.).

Email Subject: 🛠 The Build vs. The Human Premium Post-CES & The AI Engineering Imperative (Jan 10)
Email Content: KEYARITE: TIDES Tech News By Kalilur Rahman By Kalilur Rahman Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation Read on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/build-vs-human-premium-post-ces-ai-engineering-jan-10-kalilur-rahman-ka0nc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BtCdeuPf%2BTXWhrNsIn5%2Ffow%3D%3D&midToken=AQFMjYnuODQXdg&midSig=1RQjvJUAwAEs41&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-10ivnq~mk7qgqa4~g9-null-null&eid=10ivnq-mk7qgqa4-g9 🛠 The Build vs. The Human Premium Post-CES & The AI Engineering Imperative (Jan 10) With the curtain drawn on CES 2026, the industry faces the ultimate "build" challenge: moving from concept to scalable reality. Today's edition breaks down the engineering feats behind the AI revolution—from new coding paradigms and data privacy strategies to the infrastructure required to make "intelligent environments"

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isInvestmentEmail": true or false,
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain investment information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isInvestmentEmail" (boolean) and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
